projects.name: AI-OS
projects.tagline: Three-part AI Operating System
projects.description: Complete AI operating system with web dashboard (SvelteKit), autonomous task discovery engine, and overnight innovation layer. All interconnected via shared JSON state. Dashboard is the single source of truth for everything Otto does.
projects.highlight: 9.47/10 PRD score — 3 interconnected systems

projects.name: Otto Dashboard v3.2
projects.tagline: Native macOS menubar app for real-time Otto status
projects.description: macOS menubar app — project tracker, model switcher, job monitor, Todos tab. Deployed at /Applications/Otto Dashboard.app. Recent work: Todos tab added, model switch polling fixed, 8-bug fix, live-data connection.
projects.highlight: Full audit + 8 bugs fixed — Production ready ✅

projects.name: Otto Voice
projects.tagline: Real-time LAN voice conversation with Otto
projects.description: Full-duplex voice system using Faster-Whisper (STT) + Ollama/qwen3:32b (LLM) + Piper/Kokoro TTS on Windows PC with RTX 5090. WebSocket-based, settings UI, context bridge syncing knowledge from text Otto.
projects.highlight: RTX 5090 powered — dual TTS engines

projects.name: JR OpenClaw
projects.tagline: Dedicated coding agent on PC WSL2 with own Telegram bot
projects.description: JR deployed as a full OpenClaw agent on Windows PC WSL2 with dedicated Telegram bot. API-only enforcement active — all jobs route through DashScope API (Qwen 3.5 Plus). Replaces legacy FastAPI JR with production-grade agent infrastructure.
projects.highlight: API-only enforcement active — all post-fix jobs compliant

projects.name: Orbital Scavenger
projects.tagline: 3D space game — Earth/Moon/Mars with gravity and hacking
projects.description: Full 3D space game with Earth/Moon/Mars environments, click-to-move with realistic gravity simulation, collectibles, enemy encounters, and a hacking minigame. 36/36 tasks complete in one session. MVP built with Three.js.
projects.highlight: 36/36 tasks — full MVP in one session

projects.name: Tiered Gateway Architecture
projects.tagline: Local 70B primary + dynamic Opus escalation
projects.description: Mike's cost optimization design: local 70B Q4 handles 70-80% of traffic, Kimi 15-20%, Opus escalates for 5-10% complex tasks. Projected 60% Opus cost reduction. 33KB architecture plan.
projects.highlight: 60% cost reduction target — 8.4/10 PRD
